heroHeadline: Amputation is not the only way out
heroSub: We are medical engineering professionals specializing in vascular and lymphatic disorders. When years of treatment have brought no improvement, we study the case, design a customized and affordable protocol, and follow up until the desired result is achieved.

seo.title: MediVasc | Prevention of Foot and Leg Amputation
seo.description: MediVasc designs customized, affordable protocols for lymphedema, venous ulcers, diabetic foot, DVT, filariasis, and bedridden or elderly patients, with documented recoveries and follow-up until the desired result.
